steps.title: Find the yearly savings
steps.content: The old yearly energy cost is \$4,334 and the new yearly energy cost is \$2,712, so the yearly savings are $$4{,}334-2{,}712.$$

steps.title: Represent savings after t years
steps.content: After $t$ years, the cumulative savings are $$(4{,}334-2{,}712)t.$$ The savings must exceed the \$25,000 installation cost, so the savings must be greater than $25{,}000$.
